programs.title: Sin City ER
programs.desc: A brutal assault could end a star athlete's career, a 28-year-old man is hit in the head by a flying baseball bat; and a Vegas chef falls asleep with a loaded gun.

programs.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programs.desc: A patient appears to be hallucinating and sends ER staff on a wild goose chase; a new nurse makes a shocking mistake; doctors try to help a former EMT who is found lethargic and slurring his words.

programs.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programs.desc: A surfer is impaled between the legs; a football player's severe leg pain leads to an unexpected diagnosis; a woman is given a clot-busting drug to cure her stroke, but she has another condition that could cause that same drug to kill her.

programs.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programs.desc: A boa constrictor has wrapped around a man's arm and won't let go; a young woman has a severe laceration, but doctors begin to suspect there may be more to her case than the injury; a young man goes into anaphylactic shock after a dinner out.

programs.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programs.desc: An urgent care physician must think outside the box to care for two emergencies at once; a woman with abdominal pain receives an unexpected diagnosis; a yoga instructor has a dangerously high temperature for no obvious reason.

programs.title: Untold Stories of the E.R.
programs.desc: A patient gets brought in with a live shark clamped onto his thigh, and he wants to save the shark; complications arise for a woman with a life-threatening condition; a mysterious condition causes a man to pass out.
